Workspace .env CLOUDSDK_PYTHON could influence Gmail setup gcloud execution. In affected versions, a workspace `.env` in a repository opened by a trusted operator could influence which Python runtime `gcloud` used through `CLOUDSDK_PYTHON`.

This advisory is scoped to the named feature and configuration. It does not change OpenClaw's trusted-operator model: authenticated Gateway operators, installed plugins, and intentional local execution surfaces remain trusted unless a separate policy, approval, allowlist, sandbox, or auth boundary is crossed.

### Impact

When the affected feature is enabled and reachable, this could run setup through an unintended local Python path. Practical impact depends on the operator's configuration and whether lower-trust input can reach that path.

### Patched Versions

The first stable patched version is `2026.5.2`.

### Mitigations

run Gmail setup from trusted workspaces and clear workspace env overrides until patched. As general hardening, keep channel and tool allowlists narrow, avoid sharing one Gateway between mutually untrusted users, and disable the affected feature when it is not needed.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00133, "percentile": 0.03106}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fq9j-vw4w-fr6v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T13:04:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fq9j-vw4w-fr6v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fq9j-vw4w-fr6v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53842"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-18T13:04:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-fq9j-vw4w-fr6v", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53842", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-arbitrary-python-runtime-execution-via-cloudsdk-python-environment-variable", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fq9j-vw4w-fr6v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-fq9j-vw4w-fr6v", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Workspace .env CLOUDSDK_PYTHON could influence Gmail setup gcloud execution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T13:04:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fq9j-vw4w-fr6v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.5.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.5.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenClaw: Workspace .env CLOUDSDK_PYTHON could influence Gmail setup gcloud execution
